name: accounting firms processing 5–15 clients/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 5–15 clients/month, manual calculations cause delays in financial reporting. We automate depreciation schedules instead of manual spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Manual calculations of fixed asset depreciation lead to errors and delays.
